title: Pan-Seared Basque Galette with Comte Cheese Sauce
description: A Chinese-inspired twist on a French classic, with crispy galette and creamy Comte cheese sauce.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a pan over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they start to brown.
Add the chopped scallions and cook for another minute.
Place the thawed galette in the pan and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side.
In a separate saucepan, melt the grated Comte cheese over low heat.
Add the soy sauce to the cheese sauce and stir until combined.
Serve the pan-seared galette with the Comte cheese sauce on top.
Garnish with additional chopped scallions if desired.
